description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front facade features a large arched window above the main entrance, a covered porch with a bench, and a garage door on the right. The rear of the house includes a spacious backyard with a green lawn, a round trampoline, and a rectangular swimming pool with adjacent lounge chairs. The upper floor has several rooms with visible interior walls, including a brick accent wall and large windows. The exterior is primarily finished in white siding, with some gray and brick elements adding contrast. The house is surrounded by low hedges at the front, enhancing its curb appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with white siding, large windows, a garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and trampoline. The design includes a prominent arched window and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched window, main entrance with porch, garage door, and front hedges.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a trampoline, swimming pool, and open lawn area.
description_view_2: Side-rear view displaying the pool, lounge chairs, and the flat roof extending over the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the upper floor's brick accent wall and the house's elongated profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large feature windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, bench seating, and a large arched window above the door
